author: codex
scope: relation endpoint-shape cleanup prep only; durable retire+replace mechanism planned but not applied

bucket.name: has_timeline_event metric-claim-to-event contract timeline rows
bucket.why_coherent: After excluding retired submissions, prior relation cleanup batches017-031, and missing-target repair work, the conductor-preferred part_of_program project->source bucket from codex-relation-rule-or-data-next9-prep.json was already fully consumed by batch031. The next exact high-confidence bucket has four has_timeline_event rows where metric_claim records were incorrectly used as timeline subjects. Each cited block ties a contract amount metric claim to a contract delivery/evaluation/extension event. Replacing with supports event -> metric_claim preserves the source-backed association without widening has_timeline_event beyond timeline-capable subjects.

checkpoint_context.method: Read-only inventory over canonical JSONL and canonical.db with current endpoint-shape rules; excluded retired submissions, prior codex relation cleanup prep originals through batch031, and missing-target repair work. Did not run CLI validate, materialize, export-jsonl, DB repair/publish, or provider-backed commands.

next9_project_source_bucket_status.status_after_exclusions: All three exact examples from next9 are excluded because batch031 prepared them.

canonical_db_read_check.command: sqlite3 data/canonical.db select record_id, relation_kind, subject_id, object_id for the four candidate records
canonical_db_read_check.result: Confirmed all four candidate records are current canonical has_timeline_event rows with metric_claim subjects and event objects.

local_validation.tooling: createSubmissionEntry plus relationEndpointIssues using accepted local observation ids by source; relationEndpointShapeIssue checked against canonical endpoint kinds for each replacement

command_evidence.result: 1 before writing; artifact did not already exist.
Confirmed next9 recommended part_of_program project->source examples and exact record ids.

command_evidence.command: endpoint-shape inventory script excluding retired submissions and cleanup batches017-031
command_evidence.result: Remaining top exact buckets included has_timeline_event metric_claim->event count 4; next9 project->source examples were excluded by batch031.

command_evidence.command: createSubmissionEntry dry run for four supports replacements
command_evidence.result: All four replacement entries accepted with no issues, no warnings, and no endpoint-shape issue.

command_evidence.command: collision guard script over retired.json, data/submissions, and prior prep artifacts
command_evidence.result: No original retired/prior hits and no replacement submission id or local observation id collisions.

retire.reason: The original relation uses a metric_claim as the has_timeline_event subject. The cited block ties the Nova Bus AEB total amount to an April 2024 delivery completion event, so supports event -> metric_claim preserves the association without treating the metric claim as a timeline-bearing record.

tool_args.label: Nova AEB delivery completion supports total amount metric
tool_args.raw_text: Delivery of all five buses is anticipated to be completed in April 2024.

payload.description: Replacement for malformed has_timeline_event metric_claim -> event relation; source links the Nova Bus AEB contract amount with the delivery completion timeline, so the event supports the contract amount metric claim.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Delivery of all five buses is anticipated to be completed in April 2024
